content: LangGraph 0.2.45→1.2.6: no API breaking changes in StateGraph, add_conditional_edges, compile(). Core imports (langchain_core.messages.*, langgraph.graph.*) stable. Ecosystem chain: langgraph 1.2.6 requires langgraph-checkpoint>=4.1.0 + langchain-core>=1.4.7. langchain 1.3.x now depends on langgraph as core dep.
